summary: Iteration 65: Bug fixes testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested: 1) StarField count=120 gold bubbles on session header, 2) Backend email footer_email parameter fix, 3) Step 2 verified email badge and Continue to Payment button, 4) Booker info prefill from first participant, 5) Free enrollment checkout flow.

EnrollmentPage.jsx lines 595-607: Booker info (name, email, phone, country) correctly prefilled from first participant

context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes for iteration 65 verified working: email footer_email parameter, StarField 120 bubbles, step 2 verified state UI, booker info prefill, and free enrollment checkout. Session enrollment page shows 120 gold sparkles on purple header. When email is verified, step 2 shows green badge and Continue to Payment button alongside Back button.

email_footer_email_parameter.details: enrollment_confirmation_email function accepts footer_email parameter without NameError

step2_verified_state.details: Code correctly renders green verified badge and Continue to Payment button when emailVerified=true
